allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''sim_datetime:'''', d.get\(''''sim_datetime'''', ''''NOT FOUND''''\)\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 10316 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id 28020 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host done")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id 28020 | Select-Object Id, Name, Path, StartTime")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python* | Stop-Process -Force; Get-Process uvicorn* | Stop-Process -Force")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen | ForEach-Object { $p = $_.OwningProcess; Write-Host ""PID: $p""; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }")
